title: Install Tensorflow on Windows 10
excerpt: 1 Install CUDA and cuDNNDownload CUDA Toolkit and cuDNN. Choose the version your GPU support. 2 Install Anaconda2.1 Download and install AnacondaDownload Anaconda here and tick “Add Anaconda to my PATh environment variable“ during installing. 2.2 Switch the software source of pip and condaDomestic mirrors can accelerate the download speed of installing packages using pip and conda.There are some mirrors in China for both pip and conda. 2.2.1 PipPip source: 1. 阿里云 http://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/ 2. 中国科技大学 https://pypi.mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/simple/ 3. 豆瓣(douban) http://pypi.douban.com/simple/ 4. 清华大学 https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple/ 5. 中国科学技术大学 http://pypi.mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/simple/

title: Show latex equations in markdowns for jekyll
excerpt: 1 Install and adopt kramdown gemInstall kramdown using gem.1gem install kramdown Add content below to _config.yml to adopt kramdown1markdown: kramdown
